innateAbility.name: Liquid Courage
innateAbility.description: Grants self a status resistance buff whenever Brewmaster's max health falls below a certain threshold.The lower Brewmaster's health, the greater the status resistance.

abilities.name: Thunder Clap
abilities.description: Slams the ground, dealing damage and applies a movement speed slow and attack speed slow within the radius.

abilities.name: Cinder Brew
abilities.description: Drenches enemy units within the radius with a debuff upon cast, then rolls the whole barrel toward the area-targeted direction.The barrel damages and applies debuff to all enemy units the barrel collides with on its way.Upon reaching the impact location, the barrel explodes, damaging and drenching enemy units within the radius with the same debuff.

abilities.name: Drunken Brawler
abilities.description: Switches stance based on the element the Brewmaster controls, granting bonuses and adapting to the battlefield.

abilities.name: Primal Split
abilities.description: Splits Brewmaster into elements of nature, forming various specialized Brewling warriors, each with their own abilities.If any of them survives until the end of its summoned timer, the Brewmaster reappears.

abilities.name: Primal Split Cancel
abilities.description: Reunites all elements back to one, and ends Primal Split immediately.Brewmaster reappears based on the Primal Split Brewlings priority.

talents.left: Cinder Brew Applies Fear Upon Proc
+2s Drunken Brawler Brewed Up +1s Drunken Brawler Duration
